title: Specialist - Acid connection Monday board to Google Spreadsheet
excerpt:
I’m looking automation to: 

create a google spreadsheet when an item created (based in a template) and copy all information from the item.
make an acid connection between this item and the sheet.

Is it possible? Tks a …

posts.author: PW_VIDEOIMAGEM (PAULO WEIDEBACH)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking automation to:

  • create a google spreadsheet when an item created (based in a template) and copy all information from the item.
  • make an acid connection between this item and the sheet.

Is it possible? Tks a lot

posts.author: kkovriga (Katerina Kovriga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PW_VIDEOIMAGEM ,

Maybe our Smart Spreadsheet app will work as a workaround for your case?

We’ve just released the auto-sync from boards feature. It means that when you import your board to Smart Spreadsheet, all the changes made to the board later are automatically pushed to the spreadsheet.

Hope this improvement will make your experience with monday.com more pleasant and smooth.

Best regards,
Katerina Kovriga

posts.author: Hezibo (Hezi Bosmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @PW_VIDEOIMAGEM
It’s possible to do that with 3rd party integration like make.com or Zapier.

Feel free to reach me if you need some help
